info.english_meaning: to become hot to glow to burn to be jealous
info.hindI_arTa: tapta honA jalanA jalAnA tapta karanA mana yA SarIra meM jalanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: santAperTe tapet dAhe tApayet tapate tapet ' (Slo. 131) iti devaH
